        # Downsample back to original resolution
        result = cv2.resize(

        self._total_count += 1
        return result
def stats(self) -> str:
        """Return summary string for shutdown logging."""
        if self._total_count == 0:
            return "Maxine: no frames processed"
        return f"Maxine: enhanced {self._total_count} frames"
